title: Number Guessing Game
description: Set a secret number (e.g., 7). Use a while loop to let the user guess. Keep asking until they get it right. Print 'Correct!' and stop.

title: Count Digits
description: Ask for a positive integer. Count how many digits it has using a while loop. Print the count.
starterCode:
num = int(input("Number: "))
count = 0

# Count digits using while loop
solution:
num = int(input("Number: "))
count = 0
while num > 0:
    num //= 10
    count += 1
print(f"Digits: {count}")
